title: OmniRoute-Core — Supply Chain Operations
description: Real-time tenant latency, WES vendor error rates, and P99 API throughput

search.query: index=omniroute_metrics metric=order_pipeline_duration_ms | stats p50(duration) as p50, p95(duration) as p95, p99(duration) as p99 by tenant.id | timechart span=1m avg(p99) by tenant.id

visualizations.title: Error Rate % by Active Warehouse Vendor (WES)

search.query: index=omniroute_logs sourcetype=omniroute:execution (vendor=AutoStore OR vendor=Vanderlande OR vendor=Locus OR vendor=Schaefer OR vendor=Rapyuta) | eval error=if(status>=400 OR status="ERROR",1,0) | stats sum(error) as errors count as total by vendor | eval error_pct=round(100*errors/total,2) | sort -error_pct

index=omniroute_metrics metric=http_server_duration service.name=omniroute-api | bucket _time span=1m | stats count as requests by _time | eval rps=requests/60 | timechart span=1m perc99(rps) as p99_rps
index=omniroute_metrics metric=omniroute_pubsub_backlog_depth | stats latest(value) as backlog
index=omniroute_audit sourcetype=inventory:adjustment adjustment_type IN (overage, shortage, damage) | table _time tenant.id sku reason_code quantity_delta audit.legal_hold
